title: 身为“普通人”，他们挑选弱者下手的能力是很强的 | 原文
content: An author analyzes a case where four people used a fake 5,000-word negative review to extort a free meal from a Chaoshan hotpot restaurant. The author argues this exemplifies "predators targeting the weak"—the group deliberately chose a perceived vulnerable small business rather than tougher targets like halal restaurants. The restaurant owner complied to avoid conflict, confirming their vulnerability assessment.

title: 高中没毕业的杀人犯狱中自学数学，发表重磅论文，寻求减刑被否决 | 原文
content: Christopher Havens, a high school dropout serving a 25-year murder sentence in Washington state, taught himself advanced mathematics in prison without computers or internet access. He published peer-reviewed pure mathematics research and became an affiliate researcher at UCLA while attempting to reform prison education. Despite receiving unanimous parole board recommendations for sentence reduction, the governor denied his request, preventing his early release.

title: Chanchan：真高潮如何帮女性建立主体性？ | 原文
content: Chanchan, a research assistant professor at Hong Kong Polytechnic University, studies female sexuality—a topic long neglected in academia and daily life. Unlike the open conversations about sex depicted in "Sex and the City," many Chinese women lack spaces to discuss sexuality, understand their bodies, or seek help. Chanchan's research addresses this gap, exploring how authentic female orgasm can help women develop agency and subjectivity.

content: A 17-year-old Ohio girl killed her boyfriend and another passenger by crashing a speeding car into a wall. content: AI tools like Codex allow 3 people to do the work of 10, but developers feel more anxious and controlled by AI. The gap between compressed timelines and code complexity makes it hard to understand AI-generated logic line-by-line, creating dependency anxiety and fear of inability to work without AI.

title: AI Eats the World? A Reality Check with Benedict Evans
content: Tech analyst Benedict Evans discusses AI's current state with Erik Torenberg, examining coding agents, foundation models, infrastructure spending, and software economics. Evans explains why coding became AI's first breakout use case, uses previous platform shifts to contextualize the present moment, and notes that fundamental questions about AI remain unresolved. The conversation explores whether AI models will capture value themselves or serve as infrastructure for future applications, alongside topics of enterprise adoption, consumer behavior, and software's future evolution.

title: 有色学习笔记（五）：铜
content: Copper supply faces rigid constraints: declining capital expenditure, scarce new discoveries, aging mines with falling ore grades, and frequent operational disruptions mean no significant new capacity for 5-10 years. TC/RC treatment charges have turned negative, forcing smelter cutbacks and making resources king. Demand is structurally transforming with irreversible growth from AI data centers, renewable energy, grid expansion, and electric vehicles. China's grid investment alone will reach $12 trillion by 2030. This systemic supply-demand gap will widen, supporting copper prices. Zijin Mining stands out among global peers through counter-cyclical resource expansion, low-cost assets, and strong execution capabilities, positioning it as a growth-oriented resources company rather than a cyclical play.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 光模块龙头未来的壁垒和估值的新展望
content: The AI optical interconnect market is undergoing a structural shift from simple GPU-to-GPU links to heterogeneous CPU/GPU/LPU scale-up architectures, expanding demand. Industry barriers are rising through four mechanisms: increasingly complex product architectures requiring silicon photonics and advanced packaging expertise; stricter customer certification from hyperscalers and Nvidia; scarce silicon photonics foundry capacity requiring multi-year pre-commitments; and proliferating technology paths with high R&D costs. Mid-tier vendors face significant disadvantages. Leading firms like InnoLight are evolving from module manufacturers toward fabless silicon photonics design and system-level delivery platforms, with strong TOWER foundry relationships and multi-material platform capabilities. Market valuation remains anchored to traditional manufacturing multiples, creating potential for re-rating as semiconductor-like characteristics become recognized.

title: boss-skill v3.9.5 发布，聊聊对 Harness 的一点新理解
content: Harness v3.9.5 introduces a workflow-plan.json layer that compiles pipeline packs and artifact DAGs into explicit execution definitions, separating process definition (hashes, plans) from runtime instances (runId, execution state). The system now has five layers: definition, runtime (event-driven, not chat-based), artifacts (recorded deliverables, not agent claims), gates (approval checkpoints), and recovery (resume from interruption without full rerun). The main SKILL.md was reduced from 474 to 99 lines, with lengthy processes split into referenceable sub-documents.

title: 上次说到很多人是躺不平的，我觉得这和激素关系很大。\n\n比如我就会分泌比较多的皮质醇，而且皮质醇比较敏感。很多生活里的小事，我身体本能都会当成是很大的威...
content: The author attributes their inability to "lie flat" to hormones, particularly sensitive, elevated cortisol levels. They describe being a high-energy "natural worker" since childhood—needing little sleep, constantly alert, and driven to work compulsively. However, this becomes a curse when they want to rest: frequent waking at 3 AM, inability to feel calm without productivity, racing thoughts, and escalating anxiety. They identify cortisol, adrenaline, dopamine, and insulin as driving this cycle, while serotonin is depleted. They are now seeking methods to escape this state and achieve inner peace.

title: 分享 5-6 月份 CISA,CISSP 考试心得
content: A test-taker passed both CISA and CISSP exams between May and June after being laid off earlier in the year. For CISA, one month of preparation focusing on study materials and practice questions was needed, with about one-third of questions familiar from the official question bank; the management-oriented concepts required shifting from a technical mindset. For CISSP, heavy practice question drilling yielded 60% accuracy on first attempts; only 5-8 out of 100 questions were recognized. Both exams felt difficult but were completed successfully.

title: 3 天，我用 LLM 造了一群会记忆、会自保、会贸易、会谈恋爱、还会抗命的 AI 游戏
content: A developer created a turn-based AI game in three days using large language models. Each unit has independent memory, personality traits, and decision-making capabilities. The AI system uses constrained action spaces rather than open-ended prompts, with structured JSON outputs validated against business rules. Units feature layered memory systems including short-term events, long-term summaries, and trauma flashbacks triggered by environmental similarity. Relationships, trade, and reproduction require mutual consent through multi-step prompts rather than player commands. The creator notes AI tools dramatically accelerate individual development, enabling solo creators to handle design, coding, and deployment previously requiring teams.

title: 关于 API 限流：令牌桶到底怎么写才稳？
content: The article shares production experience implementing a smooth token bucket rate limiter. Key points: replace timers with lazy calculation on request arrival to avoid CPU overhead for inactive buckets; require weight parameters in consume() since API limits use weighted costs, not simple counts; set local limits 5–10% below official thresholds and add exponential backoff on 429 errors to handle network jitter; provide a minimal Python prototype using atomic operations and lazy token computation; recommend Redis + Lua for distributed environments instead of synchronized variables.

content: During a summer heatwave with temperatures reaching 35°C, Chinese consumers are buying winter clothing through livestream e-commerce. During Douyin's 618 shopping festival, some merchants achieved 4.2 million yuan in single livestream sessions, with brands generating over 10 million yuan in sales within 13 days. Off-season purchasing has become a standard strategy for apparel retailers.

title: 2.4亿单身群体，捧出了这个红利赛道
content: China's 240 million singles are reshaping dining. "Solo dining" has evolved from a budget-driven necessity to a self-care lifestyle emphasizing emotional value, comfort, and personalized experience. Popular formats now include refined noodle shops, conveyor-belt restaurants, and chef-counter seating. Rather than literal solitude, the trend reflects "individual decision-making within social settings"—groups dining together but choosing separately. Driven by demographic shifts (100 million living alone), changing consumer psychology valuing "heart-value" over cost, and younger generations' comfort with solitude, this transformation demands restaurants redesign products (modular portions), pricing, and spaces to prioritize autonomy, experience, and emotional satisfaction.

title: 美方拟对 60 个经济体加征关税，对中国征收 12.5% 的额外关税，该提案会被通过吗？影响有多大？
content: On June 2, the U.S. Trade Representative's office proposed additional tariffs of 10% on imports from 15 economies including the EU, and 12.5% on 45 others including China, Japan, and India. The move follows a Supreme Court ruling that invalidated broader tariffs under emergency powers. Public comments are due by July 6, with hearings July 7. The U.S. cited forced labor concerns, but China denied this. The EU and China strongly opposed the proposal, warning it damages trade relations. The proposal's passage remains uncertain amid international opposition.

title: 天涯是文科生的GitHub
content: Tianya, once China's largest Chinese online community with 130 million registered users, relaunched on Children's Day 2026 after a three-year shutdown due to millions in unpaid server debts. Founded in 1999, the platform produced iconic user-generated content including novels like *Ghost Blows Out the Light* and viral essays that remain influential. However, its revival faces serious challenges: the "golden age" conditions that produced legendary posts—high barriers to entry, unregulated expression, and dedicated expert contributors writing for free—no longer exist. Modern platforms' algorithms prioritize fresh content over longevity. Despite attempts at crowdfunding and new business models, Tianya struggled commercially, with monthly active users dropping from nearly 3 million in 2016 to hundreds of thousands by 2020. The most realistic path forward may be leveraging its extensive original content as AI training data rather than competing as a social platform.

title: “ChatGPT以后可能要没了”
content: OpenAI announced that Codex will merge into ChatGPT within weeks, marking a shift from chat to AI agent execution. The move follows Codex's rapid growth to 5 million weekly active users, with non-programmers growing three times faster than developers. OpenAI also introduced six role-specific agent plugins, document annotation, and协作网站生成 features. The company is positioning ChatGPT+Codex+Atlas browser as a unified agentic platform. The strategy was largely driven by competitive pressure from Anthropic's Claude Code, which achieved faster revenue growth. Codex differentiates through lower cost and higher token efficiency using GPT-5.5, despite inferior code quality in blind tests.

title: FBI探员如何渗透进黑手党？ | 电影《忠奸人》背后的知识（三） | 原文
content: This article examines how FBI agent Joseph Pistone infiltrated the Mafia for the film "Donnie Brasco." In reality, Pistone, posing as Donnie Brasco, first joined Colombo family associate "Kitty" Greca's crew, then connected to Bonanno soldier Anthony Mirra, who introduced him to "Lefty." The film simplified this by eliminating Mirra's character and creating a scene where Lefty checks Donnie's reliability with Kitty. Google Research has open-sourced its AI flood forecasting framework on GitHub to advance global flood preparedness. The Python-based package uses PyTorch and Long Short-Term Memory networks to predict river flow rates from weather and geographical data. Researchers and forecasters can train models using open data or incorporate local datasets. The upgraded model extends reliable prediction by six days in gauged basins. Partners like the Czech Hydrometeorological Institute validated the system and integrated it into operational platforms, enabling broader access to advanced forecasting for resource-limited regions.

title: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
content: Google's Gemma 4 12B is an open, encoder-free multimodal AI model that processes text, images, and video through a unified architecture. Unlike traditional multimodal systems that use separate encoders, it eliminates this component entirely, simplifying the design while maintaining performance. The model is designed for efficiency and accessibility, targeting developers and researchers seeking capable yet deployable multimodal AI solutions without complex infrastructure requirements.
